title: Custom Action with Config
overview: Add custom actions to existing pages by using the differential customization approach, which updates the buc-page-definitions.json file to customize the page.
example: Adding custom action in Order Summary screen

steps.description: Create or edit the en.json file for translation strings. For example, for the order details page:

steps.description: Build and run the application to verify the custom action is visible on the screen.

steps.title: Validate Custom Action Functionality
steps.description: Test the custom action by clicking it on the page and verifying the expected behavior (e.g., modal opens, navigation occurs, etc.).

keyPoints: Use differential customization approach via buc-page-definitions.json
Always add translation strings for custom labels
Register custom action service in app-customization.impl.ts
Use CUSTOM_FEATURE_ACTIONS provider for action registration
Subscribe to actionProcessorService to handle action clicks
